hero.label: Made for Third Bridge
hero.headline: I want to build my career where insight meets commercial urgency.
hero.subheadline: Third Bridge stands out to me because the Client Services Associate role combines fast paced outreach, client ownership, and real exposure to how investors and consultants make decisions. I am excited by the chance to cold call experts, manage multiple projects under pressure, and help clients access not just expert calls, but the full range of Third Bridge solutions.

whyCompany.title: Third Bridge turns expertise into decision-making advantage
whyCompany.body: I am drawn to how Third Bridge helps investors, consultants, and business leaders move faster with expert calls, surveys, library content, advisory, and data feeds. That mix makes the role more commercial and more strategic than a typical entry level client services position.

whyCompany.title: Early responsibility and clear progression make this moment compelling
whyCompany.body: Third Bridge expects Associates to become client facing within just a few months, which shows real trust in early career talent. The fact that managers start in this role and can grow quickly makes it especially exciting for someone like me who wants a high performance environment.

whyCompany.title: My BDR experience fits the core of this job
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I handled cold outreach, built LinkedIn sequences, worked in HubSpot, and helped bring in 15 to 20 paying clients, so I understand how to win attention and handle objections. At NextAfter, I strengthened my digital marketing and client focused thinking, which would help me support projects end to end while communicating clearly with different stakeholders.

quote: I want a role where strong outreach, speed, and commercial thinking actually matter every day. Third Bridge excites me because I would be helping clients make smarter decisions while building the kind of client facing career I want long term.
